summary: Iteration 142: Premium Tier Gating Infrastructure testing complete. Fixed critical bug in translation.py and ai_blend.py where LlmChat was called with incorrect parameters (model='gpt-4o' and .chat() method instead of session_id/system_message and .send_message()). All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend tests confirm AI Frequency Blend section, Language Panel with 7 languages, and Pricing page with Plus tier perks are working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium tier gating infrastructure fully implemented and tested. AI Blend endpoint works for all authenticated users (algorithmic for free, AI-enhanced for Plus+). Translation endpoint requires Plus tier. Language panel in SmartDock has 7 languages. Pricing page shows AI features in Plus tier perks.

backend_ai_blend_endpoint.POST_mixer_ai_blend: PASS - Returns algorithmic blend with primary frequencies, sounds, drone, dominant_mood
backend_ai_blend_endpoint.upgrade_hint: PASS - Non-premium users get upgrade_hint field

backend_tier_gating.GET_check_access_ai_frequency_blend: PASS - Returns allowed status and required tier (plus)
backend_tier_gating.GET_check_access_ai_translation: PASS - Returns allowed status and required tier (plus)
backend_tier_gating.GET_check_access_ai_coaching_blend: PASS - Returns allowed status and required tier (plus)
backend_tier_gating.unknown_features_allowed: PASS - Unknown features are allowed by default

backend_translation_endpoint.POST_translate: PASS - Requires auth and Plus tier
backend_translation_endpoint.tier_gating: PASS - Returns 403 for non-Plus users with required_tier info

backend_gated_features_config.TIER_GATED_FEATURES: PASS - Contains ai_frequency_blend, ai_translation, ai_coaching_blend requiring 'plus' tier

backend_subscription_tiers.GET_tiers: PASS - Plus tier includes 'AI-Personalized Frequency Blends' and 'AI-Powered Content Translation' perks
backend_subscription_tiers.GET_my_plan: PASS - Returns user tier, balance, perks

frontend_cosmic_mixer_page.ai_blend_section: PASS - 'AI FREQUENCY BLEND' accordion section exists
frontend_cosmic_mixer_page.generate_blend_button: PASS - 'Generate My Blend' button with data-testid='ai-blend-button' found
frontend_cosmic_mixer_page.solfeggio_frequencies: PASS - All frequency buttons visible (174Hz, 285Hz, 396Hz, etc.)

frontend_smartdock_language_panel.language_button: PASS - Globe icon in SmartDock opens language panel
frontend_smartdock_language_panel.seven_languages: PASS - 7 language options found (EN, ES, FR, HI, JA, AR, PT)
frontend_smartdock_language_panel.language_selection: PASS - Selecting Spanish highlights it and saves preference

frontend_pricing_page.plus_tier_card: PASS - Plus tier card visible with $9.99/mo
frontend_pricing_page.ai_frequency_blends_perk: PASS - 'AI-Personalized Frequency Blends' in Plus tier perks
frontend_pricing_page.ai_translation_perk: PASS - 'AI-Powered Content Translation' in Plus tier perks
frontend_pricing_page.ai_coaching_blends_perk: PASS - 'AI Coaching Sound Blends' in Plus tier perks

translation_py_llmchat_error.issue: LlmChat.__init__() got unexpected keyword argument 'model' and 'LlmChat' object has no attribute 'chat'
translation_py_llmchat_error.root_cause: translation.py used incorrect LlmChat API: LlmChat(api_key=..., model='gpt-4o') and llm.chat([UserMessage(content=...)])
translation_py_llmchat_error.fix_applied: Changed to LlmChat(api_key=..., session_id=..., system_message=...) and llm.send_message(UserMessage(text=...))

ai_blend_py_llmchat_error.issue: Same LlmChat API error as translation.py
ai_blend_py_llmchat_error.fix_applied: Changed to correct LlmChat API pattern
